name: safe-pause
description: Pauses Claude Code when Claude.ai subscription usage crosses a configurable threshold. Fetches live utilization from the Claude.ai API using your session credentials.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Return current Claude.ai subscription utilization (five_hour and seven_day)

tools.name: refresh_usage
tools.description: Force-fetch fresh usage data from the Claude.ai API and update the local cache

tools.name: set_credentials
tools.description: Store your claude.ai org_id and session_key so the server can fetch usage without a browser

org_id.title: Organization ID
org_id.description: Your claude.ai organization ID (visible in claude.ai network requests to /api/organizations/...)

session_key.title: Session Key
session_key.description: Your claude.ai sessionKey cookie value — find it in browser DevTools → Application → Cookies → claude.ai
